overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in tactical military gear with a large backpack walking through a sunlit desert canyon. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character navigates a rocky dirt path between steep canyon walls with sparse desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon carrying tactical gear and a large backpack

entered.detail: steep rocky canyon wall with layered sedimentary rock formations
tall rocky cliff face casting shadows on the canyon floor
sandy dirt trail winding through the canyon bottom
hazy mountain peaks visible through the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow desert canyon with steep rock walls on both sides. The path is sandy with scattered rocks and sparse desert shrubs. Bright midday sun illuminates the scene from above, casting sharp shadows across the canyon floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding canyon trail opening to larger rock formation

events.description: canyon path curves revealing a large prominent rock formation ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the canyon as the path widens slightly and new terrain features come into view

entered.detail: massive light-colored rock mountain rising at the end of the canyon
loose rocks and stone debris along the trail edge

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, the canyon walls recede into the distance while a massive rock formation comes into view ahead. The path remains sandy but becomes scattered with more rocks and boulders. The canyon opens slightly, allowing more sky to be visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon approach to large rock face

events.description: terrain becomes significantly more rocky and uneven underfoot

agents.ego_description: approaching the large rock face at the end of the canyon section, navigating rougher terrain

entered.detail: cluster of large rocks and stone debris on the canyon slope
uneven gravel and stone surface replacing the sandy path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive rock formation that now dominates the center of the view. The ground becomes rougher with gravel and scattered boulders replacing the sandy trail. The canyon walls continue to recede to the sides as the path leads toward the imposing rock face ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow desert canyon that gradually opens up toward a massive, imposing rock formation. It begins with the character navigating a sandy path flanked by steep rock walls under the harsh glare of the midday sun. As the character progresses, the canyon walls recede into the distance and the sky becomes more visible, while the terrain shifts from soft sand to a surface scattered with boulders. The scene then expands as the path leads directly toward the towering rock formation that begins to dominate the center of the view. Finally, the ground transforms into rough gravel and scattered stones as the character approaches the massive rock face.
